summary: A hallway/walk-in wardrobe area presenting in generally good order with recent decoration. Walls are emulsioned in white and a soft grey/blue tone, woodwork is white-gloss, and flooring transitions between grey fitted carpet and oak-effect laminate. Built-in wardrobes finished in grey wood-effect veneer house bedding and clothes hangers. Minor scuff marks noted to one wall and the carpet shows shading/foot-traffic marks but is otherwise clean to domestic standard.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth plastered ceiling, emulsioned white throughout the hallway and wardrobe area.

items.name: Walls (white emulsion)
items.description: Plastered walls finished in white emulsion to hallway/wardrobe area.
defects: Light scuff/scratch marks and faint hand-marks to wall section as shown in P180
Pencil-style scratch line approx mid-height in P180

items.name: Wall (grey/blue emulsion)
items.description: Plastered wall finished in soft grey/blue emulsion adjacent to wardrobe doorway.

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White-painted profiled timber skirting boards throughout hallway and wardrobe area.

items.name: Internal door (white)
items.description: Flush white-painted internal door with dark bronze/gunmetal lever handle on rose and matching latch, mounted on chrome/steel hinges.
defects: Light marking to lower section near base as shown in P178

items.name: Door lever handle (gunmetal)
items.description: Dark bronze/gunmetal finish lever handle on circular rose with matching latch and turn-button (privacy lock).

items.name: Light/switch plates
items.description: Dark bronze/antique-finish switch plates fitted to hallway walls.

items.name: Ceiling light fitting
items.description: Recessed/flush ceiling light fitting visible to hallway ceiling.

items.name: Fitted carpet (grey)
items.description: Grey cut-pile fitted carpet to hallway and wardrobe floor area.
defects: Shading/foot-traffic marks and pile-direction marks visible in P185 and P186
Slight darker patches consistent with traffic in P186

items.name: Oak-effect laminate flooring
items.description: Oak-effect laminate plank flooring to adjoining hallway/room area, with metal threshold strip at carpet junction.

items.name: Threshold/transition strip
items.description: Metal threshold trim at junction between laminate flooring and carpet.

items.name: Built-in wardrobe
items.description: Fitted built-in wardrobe finished in grey/brown wood-effect veneer, with hinged doors on chrome hinges, top shelf, and chrome hanging rail with integrated LED strip lighting beneath shelf.

items.name: Wardrobe LED strip light
items.description: Integrated LED strip lighting fitted beneath wardrobe shelf above hanging rail.

items.name: Clothes hangers (pink/multicoloured)
items.description: Assorted plastic clothes hangers in pink, white and grey, hanging on wardrobe rail.

items.name: Bedding/pillows
items.description: White textured/quilted bedding and pillows stored on top shelf of wardrobe.

items.name: Oil-filled column radiator
items.description: Black portable oil-filled column radiator visible in adjoining room through doorway.
